stemHtml: Aircraft F-PO at FL50 requests descent to 3000 ft with QFE 1005 hPa. The transition altitude is published. How should ATC respond?

options.b: "F-PO is cleared to descend to FL50 to 3000 ft, QFE 1005."
options.c: "F-PO is cleared to descend from FL50 to 3000 ft, QFE 1005."
options.d: "F-PO, you are cleared to descend from FL50, transition altitude 3000 ft, QFE 1005."
